hypothesis: Incorporating a synthesizability-aware feedback signal derived from LLM-extracted synthesis route embeddings from scientific literature into MatAgent's Property Evaluation stage will simultaneously improve the experimental realizability of proposed compositions and reduce the number of iterations required to reach target formation energies, because grounding the iterative refinement in documented synthesis feasibility will constrain the LLM's compositional search toward thermodynamically accessible pathways rather than computationally favorable but experimentally intractable materials.
